prompt: I'm writing a blog post for the R-Ladies website recapping our Oslo International Women's Day meetup. It's co-written by two of us and one person edited it. Where does the file go in the repo, and can you give me the YAML frontmatter to start from?
assertions: Mentions the `hugo new --kind blog` archetype command
Frontmatter lists authors with a directory_id field
Includes an editorial/editor field for the editor
Shows a contributions map plus per-person contribution letters
Uses a date in YYYY-MM-DD format
Includes an image with both path and alt text
Notes the feature image lives in the same folder as index.en.md
